suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny validation/reviewer procedure so Task-spawned `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents can run with automatic execution approval in this worker environment, or document the manual-review fallback explicitly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In this settings-polish scrutiny run, all three Task invocations for `rust-settings-commands`, `settings-page`, and `navigation-and-polish` exited immediately with `Exec ended early: insufficient permission to proceed`, so the validator had to complete all reviews manually after checking the handoffs, transcript skeletons, and commit diffs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the UI-validation guidance to reference the current dev surface on port 24200 (or point workers to `.factory/services.yaml` as the source of truth) instead of the stale `http://localhost:1420` URL.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md still says to use `http://localhost:1420`, while `.factory/services.yaml` healthcheck and `src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` both use port 24200. The settings-polish navigation review also confirmed manual validation was performed on `http://localhost:24200`.
